form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation when last of 10 at this track July Sprint July 19 over 1100m, soft track; 10 len behind Romeo's Choice carrying 57kg at $5.50. Previously first up; seventh of 12 at Eagle Farm in the LR Lightning Hcp June 7 over 1000m, soft track; 1.75 len behind Vodka Martini with 57.5kg at $10. Tough sprinter primed for this with the two trial wins, minor claims.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently favourite; came from midfield and won by 0.9 len at Gold Coast Hcp March 14 over 1000m on a rain affected track defeating Power Of The Brave carrying 53kg at $2.35. Before that 3rd of 11 at Gold Coast Mm Sprint on January 17 over 1200m, 2 len behind Axius with 56kg at $41. Has confidence back and don?t underestimate.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up ran last of 12 at Randwick Bm88 on February 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Mal Coupe carrying 59.5kg at $18. Second run from a spell came from midfield and won by a nose at Kembla Grange Lillye - Bm94 March 13 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Monte Kate carrying 57kg at $8.50. Returned to winning form and since fitted with a tick over trial, respect.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 44-day let-up. First-up after five months 4th of 10 at Doomben Cl6-Sw on February 21 over 1110m, 1.5 len behind Taltarni Fields with 57kg at $10. Previously second-up 7th of 10 at this track Bm88 on September 13 over 1100m, slow going 2.5 len behind Fire Star with 59kg at $20. Eye-catching return and goes into the exotics.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Not raced for 38 days. First-up raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 1.4 len at this track 4yo+ Bm78 January 17 over 1100m in heavy going defeating Eye Of The Fire carrying 56.5kg at $4.20. Last start won by 1.75 len at Canterbury Bm78 Final February 27 over 1100m on a rain affected track defeating Kimberley Secrets with 61kg at $3.30. Profiles nicely. One of the major players undefeated in five starts.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign when last of 12 at Flemington in the G3 Begonia Belle November 1 over 1100m, 6 len behind New York Lustre with 55kg at $26. Previously first up; third of 10 at Randwick Bm78 May 24 over 1000m, on heavy track; 1.0 len behind Storm The Ramparts carrying 55.5kg at $8.50. Good sprinting mare well placed with the claim first-up.

form.formComment: Last start sat on the pace before fading 10th of 14 at this track in the G3 B/Day Card on March 21 over 1200m, slow going 4 len behind Catch The Glory with 53.5kg at $14. The start before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 12 at Randwick in the G3 Wenonagirl on March 7 over 1200m, 0.7 len behind Gangsta Granny carrying 53kg at $41. Back in class and hard to stop with the blinkers going on.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Group-placed filly with excellent fresh credentials.
